command:
BASE="http://192.168.0.191:5678/webhook/chatgpt-homelab-agent"

echo "=== TEST 1: router info ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"router info"}' -o /tmp/t1.json
python3 -c "
import json
d=json.load(open('/tmp/t1.json'))
if isinstance(d,list): d=d[0]
print('Response keys:', list(d.keys())[:8])
sent=d.get('sentinel',{})
print('sentinel.enabled:', sent.get('enabled'))
print('sentinel.phase:', sent.get('phase'))
print('sentinel.mode:', sent.get('mode'))
print('sentinel.result:', sent.get('result'))
print('sentinel_result:', d.get('sentinel_result'))
print('PASS' if sent.get('enabled') and sent.get('result')=='PASS' else 'FAIL - sentinel not in response')
"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 2: router health ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"router health"}' -o /tmp/t2.json
python3 -c "
import json
d=json.load(open('/tmp/t2.json'))
if isinstance(d,list): d=d[0]
sent=d.get('sentinel',{})
print('sentinel.enabled:', sent.get('enabled'))
print('sentinel.mode:', sent.get('mode'))
print('PASS' if sent.get('enabled') and sent.get('phase')=='8H' else 'FAIL - sentinel not in response')
"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 3: docker module ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"docker module"}' -o /tmp/t3.json
python3 -c "
import json
d=json.load(open('/tmp/t3.json'))
if isinstance(d,list): d=d[0]
print('Got response (docker module routed OK)')
print('sentinel_result in response:', 'sentinel_result' in d or 'sentinel' in d)
"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 4: filesystem module ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"filesystem module"}' -o /tmp/t4.json
python3 -c "
import json
d=json.load(open('/tmp/t4.json'))
if isinstance(d,list): d=d[0]
print('Got response (filesystem module routed OK)')
print('sentinel_result in response:', 'sentinel_result' in d or 'sentinel' in d)
"

echo ""
echo "=== SUMMARY ==="
python3 -c "
import json
results=[]
for i,f in enumerate(['/tmp/t1.json','/tmp/t2.json','/tmp/t3.json','/tmp/t4.json'],1):
    d=json.load(open(f))
    if isinstance(d,list): d=d[0]
    sent=d.get('sentinel',{})
    ok = sent.get('enabled') == True and sent.get('result') == 'PASS'
    results.append(ok)
    print(f'Test {i}: {\"PASS\" if ok else \"FAIL\"}  sentinel={sent.get(\"enabled\")} result={sent.get(\"result\")} mode={sent.get(\"mode\")}')
print()
print('All tests passed:', all(results))
"
